hero.hero_overview:
Lapu-Lapu is a Fighter hero known for his strong early-game pressure and dual-weapon playstyle. He excels in the EXP lane, dealing high damage while being hard to kill.
Role: Fighter
Specialty: Damage / Durability
Strengths: Strong early game, good sustain, powerful ultimate, great in 1v1 fights
Weaknesses: Short range, relies on skills, can be kited by mobile heroes
His ultimate skill lets him switch to heavy swords, gaining shields and stronger abilities, making him very effective in team fights and duels.
hero.hero_strength: Lapu-Lapu strength lies in his ability to dominate fights from the early game. He has high base damage and strong skill scaling, allowing him to win most one-on-one matchups in the EXP lane. His ultimate gives him a shield and enhanced skills, which makes him very hard to kill while increasing his damage output at the same time. Because of this, he can dive into team fights, pressure back-line heroes, and still survive long enough to retreat or finish enemies. He is especially strong against squishy heroes and in close-range combat.
hero.hero_weakness: Lapu-Lapu main weakness is his short attack range, which makes him vulnerable to heroes who can kite or poke from a distance. He relies heavily on his skills, so missing them or fighting while they are on cooldown greatly reduces his impact. Without his ultimate, he is much less tanky and easier to burst down. He also struggles against heroes with strong crowd control, as being stunned or slowed can prevent him from engaging or escaping effectively.

data.recommend: This Lapu-Lapu build focuses on maximizing early and mid-game damage with strong sustain in fights. Use his Brave Stance combo carefully, engage after the enemy uses their crowd control, and dominate

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is very effective for Lapu-Lapu because it helps him overcome his short range. It allows him to quickly close the distance to enemy back-line heroes or escape after engaging. Flicker can be combined with his ultimate or dash skill to surprise enemies, reposition in team fights, and increase his chances of securing kills while staying safe.

dominants.dominant_desc: Before 4 lvl Lapu must secure all minions with dodging every enemy poke. You can easily steal enemy crabs with your 1 skill

After you get lvl 4 you should win first turtle with your team or zone your opponent from minions. Build fast war axe and either gank mid lane or kill your opponent on lane. You must be extremely active on the map
If you reach late game you can't afford to be solo. You must engage with team or at least with 1 carry with you to kill any target

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Lapu-Lapu: A fighter/assassin known for his burst damage, crowd control, and durability in his ultimate form. He excels in engaging enemies and dealing significant damage up close.
Floryn: A support hero focused on healing, providing buffs, and offering crowd control with her ultimate. She is designed to sustain her allies and control the battlefield.
  Healing and Sustain: Floryn's healing abilities can significantly enhance Lapu-Lapu's survivability during engagements, allowing him to stay in the fight longer and utilize his skills more effectively.
Crowd Control Follow-up: Floryn's ultimate can provide crowd control, setting up opportunities for Lapu-Lapu to land his high-damage skills and secure kills.
Protection and Support: Floryn can protect Lapu-Lapu while he dives into enemy lines, ensuring he can execute his combos without

If your score is 1-10-10, just throw away the Sky Piercer and replace it by BOD

Use War Axe because this is probably the actual weapon used in the battle of Mactan

Brute Force Breastplate to equalize the fight against Magellan who is well equipped. But really it is for extra CD reduction and extra MS for chasing enemies.

Rose Gold for sustain and when jumping in the crowd fight.

hero.hero_overview:
Hero Name: Lapu-Lapu

Role: Fighter/Damage Dealer

Lapu-Lapu is a legendary warrior from the islands, known for his unmatched strength and valor. He is a master of the spear and the sword, making him an unstoppable force in battle. As a protector of his people, he uses his unique skills to dominate the battlefield and defeat invaders.
hero.hero_strength: Hero strenght? 999999 strenght
hero.hero_weakness: Weakness against: franco.

spell.spell_desc:
Type: Mobility/Teleport Spell
Cooldown: 120 seconds

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
The first Lapu-Lapu combo hero recommendation is Luo Yi, this hero is indeed the most suitable for combos, especially for counter attacks.

You can use Luo Yi  ultimate attack which can make him teleport in the desired direction.
Next is Angela, who is one of the support heroes who can give buffs to teammates. You can use Angela as one of the Lapu-Lapu combos in Mobile Legends.

counters.counter_desc: Esmeralda for me is the best counter for lapu lapu because of its ability to survive to your ultimate and having inevitable shield.

dominants.dominant_desc: For laning, if you have the advantage against your opponent, better to poke or even harass him to raise your exp and gold gap but if you have the disadvantage, learn how to freeze lane by managing the minion wave. In initiating, always reach for the damage dealer or the highest gold from the opposing side to be able to gain more golds and experience. At the late game part or the end game, get the best build for you to prolong your life when it comes to teamfights and clashes.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Agility - Extra Movement Speed

Festival of Blood - Gain stacking Spell Vamp for each hero kill or assist.

 Quantum Charge - Basic Attacks grant bonus Movement Speed and restores HP.

equips.equip_desc: I chose this build for Lapu Lapu because this is the best build that enable him to deal damage and sustain from teamfights at the same time.

hero.hero_overview: Lapu-Lapu was the most famous warrior of the Vonetis Islands. He was employed by various tribes over a long period of time, passing between the islands. The endless battles brought him weariness, dignity, honor, and money... On the battlefield, human lives were worthless.
hero.hero_strength:
Lapu-Lapu leaps to the target location while combining his twin blades into one, dealing 300(+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies upon landing and slowing them by 60% for 1s. (This skill cannot be interrupted.)

Lapu-Lapu gains 3 times the Bravery Blessing from this skill and skills in a transformed state.

For the next 10s, Lapu-Lapu enters Great Sword stance and gains enhanced skills, 30 extra Physical & Magic Defense, and his Basic Attack damage is increased to 120%.

spell.spell_desc: I chosed this spell for Lapu Lapu because it is the best spell for initiating teamfight, reach the damage dealer  and making outplays

data.title: Lapu Lapu ( The Hero of the Vonetis Island )
